summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Plant.nvls CBD website. All core features working perfectly - mini-app landing page, catalog navigation, category filtering, and dark theme with green accents.
passed_tests: Homepage displays correctly with plant.nvls logo and branding
Dark theme with green/yellow accents properly implemented
Catalogue CBD button successfully redirects to /catalogue
Category tabs (Tout, Fleurs, Résines) display and function correctly
Category filtering works perfectly (4 Fleurs + 4 Résines = 8 Total)
Product cards display with name, price, image, and category labels
Add to cart buttons are clickable and responsive
Navigation back to homepage from catalogue works
Hover effects and animations work smoothly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Product images load from Unsplash sources
